plugins.name: ado-bug-batch-creator
plugins.description: Batch-create Azure DevOps work items (Bugs or Tasks) from a plain-English list, expanding each into a structured body with STR steps, current/expected

plugins.name: content-model-test-data
plugins.description: Generate schema-aware JSON test data from a provided content model.

plugins.name: jira-bug-batch-creator
plugins.description: Batch-create Jira bug tickets from a plain-English list, with expanded descriptions, STR steps, current/expected behaviour, and Figma references.

plugins.name: optimizely-content-modelling
plugins.description: Produces a structured content model table for Optimizely blocks, pages, or components from a design screenshot, wireframe, or bullet-point brief.

plugins.name: playwright-best-practices
plugins.description: Comprehensive guidance for all aspects of Playwright test development, from writing new tests to debugging and maintaining existing test suites.

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Automate browser interactions, test web pages and work with Playwright tests.

plugins.name: playwright-test-gen
plugins.description: Converts Given/When/Then manual test cases in CSV format into Playwright TypeScript tests using the Page Object Model.

plugins.name: playwright-test-setup
plugins.description: Set up and scaffold a Playwright TypeScript test framework for web applications.

plugins.name: qa-test-script-generator
plugins.description: Generates structured QA test scripts in CSV format from functional requirements, following the Given/When/Then format.

plugins.name: refinement-doc-generator-guided
plugins.description: A guided, step-by-step wizard for producing a functional requirements spec for a CMS-based web component or feature.

plugins.name: refinement-doc-generator
plugins.description: Generate dev-ready refinement documents (functional requirements specs) for CMS-based web components.

plugins.name: screen-reader-testing-v2
plugins.description: Conduct comprehensive screen reader testing for website features.

plugins.name: testmo-run-report
plugins.description: Convert a Testmo test run CSV export into a stakeholder-friendly report showing each test's current and previous status, comments, and linked issues.

plugins.name: verify-figma-design
plugins.description: Validate that a deployed website matches its source Figma design.
